ops.text:
## E19 — GEPA + pure-exploration-bandit judge-prompt improvement loop — PRE-REGISTRATION

Driver: opus-4.8 subagent under team-lead. Harness: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E19/bin/e19.py, run from jj workspace /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-prep under `eval "$(ccp env)"` + `uv run --no-sync`. Never writes live ~/.cc-steer/feedback.db (harness clones per candidate; E8 discipline built in). No repo/jj/git mutations.

### Objective
Evolve the cc-steer Stage-2 triage judge prompt (baseline = live PROMPT_VERSION v6, cc_steer.triage.JUDGE_PROMPT) via GEPA reflective mutation (arXiv:2507.19457), screened by a pure-exploration bandit (successive elimination + top-two challenger selection). Author of mutations = fable (claude -p --model claude-fable-5). Screening judge tier = medium (sonnet). DEPLOYED judge tier = large (opus) — any winner here is PRESUMPTIVE and requires opus validation (NOT run in this loop).

### Metric
--metric combined: reward = 1 if judge accept-decision matches the row's reference label, else 0, averaged over ALL scorable panel rows (golden + stratified + E18-contested strata). Paired per-row (same panel across candidates).

### MDE (minimum detectable effect)
0.094, passed explicitly via --mde 0.094. Derivation = instrument-card-v1 formula applied at the combined-panel n≈97 (NOT a new rule):
  SE = sqrt(p·(1−p)/n), p=0.0583, n=97 → SE ≈ 0.0238
  MDE = z·sqrt(2)·SE, z=2.8016 → 2.8016·1.4142·0.0238 ≈ 0.094
Same formula yields the card's published mde_golden=0.123 at the 57-row golden panel. Card's sidecar `mde` field (0.0453) is the sentinel-AUC MDE, a different instrument — not used here.

### Stopping rule (pre-registered)
Declare a WINNER only if, for the empirical leader vs baseline on the combined metric:
  (a) delta (mean paired reward diff) >= MDE 0.094, AND
  (b) 95% paired-bootstrap CI lower bound > 0 (excludes zero).
Otherwise outcome ∈ {ceiling, no_candidate_beat_baseline, below_mde, ci_overlaps_baseline, budget-stop}. Bandit: successive_elimination keeps leader + any candidate not paired-significantly worse; top-two picks the challenger to mutate.

### Ceiling check
Baseline evaluated first (iteration 0). If baseline combined reward >= 0.95, NO winner is declarable under MDE 0.094 (headroom < MDE) → stop immediately, report ceiling + per-stratum breakdown. That is a successful, informative outcome.

### Iteration cap & budget
--iters 4 = baseline + up to 3 GEPA mutations. Budget $30 HARD. ccp is subscription-pooled (usage = 5h/7d rate-limit %, not $), so budget enforced as an EVAL-COUNT CAP: max 4 candidate-evals (~$7 each ≈ $28). Per-eval cost sanity-checked against the baseline eval before continuing.

### Loop config
--judge real --tier medium --metric combined --iters 4 --concurrency 8 --mde 0.094 --author command --author-cmd 'claude -p --model claude-fable-5' --rebuild-panel --stratified 40.
Panel = 57 golden + 40 stratified (incl. E18 contested strata auto-ingested from E18/out on --rebuild-panel).

### Pre-run verifications done
- show-mde resolves 0.0453 (card sentinel-AUC); overriding to 0.094 as derived above. ✓
- fable author CLI: stdin=request, stdout=prompt, stdout clean (hook noise stderr-only, harness uses .stdout). ✓ (realistic long-request test pending before loop)

Next: realistic author test on the live JUDGE_PROMPT, build panel + report composition, then run loop in background with baseline ceiling-monitor.
